falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish breakout, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 300% above the 20-day average on a single day within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would invalidate the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a clear market shift, inconsistent with the low-activity dynamics of the 2022 May Luna bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 (current score: 37) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a different market phase than the historical pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
